reviews.review_msg: Probably my favourite prof so far. Very inspiring and clearly wants his students to do well. Engaging lecturer and very helpful.
Most down to earth prof. He is really straight up and is one of the best profs ever. He makes his lectures intriguing.  Easy class to do well, not to much work. Very helpful and honest

Andrew is such an amazing person. He is such a cool and nice person and I wish I could have him as a prof for more classes. He goes through his slides a bit quickly, but honestly this is a really easy class to do by just reading the text book

I had Mr. Gemino for ONE class because he was our substitute. And man...our whole class wished he stayed as our permanant prof. He gave one of the best lectures i've ever had in my whole semester. He is really one of the few profs who can teach you while having fun. ANDREW, if you are reading this you're awesome!
The most down to earth prof I've ever had. He's very nice prof and wants everyone to do well! Class average was way too high though.
Very good at teaching and making class interesting.

Great Prof!  He is really interested in his students and wants all of them to succeed and do well.  The material can get a little dry but he does a great job preparing you with the fundamentals of business.
Funny but hard
First of all, MIS is the most boring class I have ever taken BUT he makes it seem like class is a lot of fun... That was the only reason why I still went to class despite the boring subjects.

Gemino is a great prof. The only thing that's annoying about this class is he tries to make MIS sound like the best career ever. The book was dry, but you have to read it cause it's heavily weighted in the exams(which are hard by the way). Gemino is a fantastic speaker and does the best he can with a pretty boring subject.
Going into MIS because of him

He is one of the best prof I had. I do not have interest towards computers and technology. And I thought I will hate this class. But this prof really made the class so much interesting than I thought. I realli feel like learning. Studying notes is very important! Strongly Recommended.

He is probably the best prof you can get for this course. This course is ridiculous, the projects take forever and aren't even worth that much. The midterm is multiple choice but really tricky. You have to do more than read the textbook for this course! It is a ton of work!

I came into this course not knowing what to expect, but I came out with an appreciation for project management. Andrew brings real-world experiences into the lecture so everything in the course seems practical. He's also quite flexible with scheduling and deadlines. The sustainability projects were quite ambitious and were fun to be a part of.

he's a pretty fun prof... projs and assignments are time consuming (and at the end, it doesnt even worth THAT much... -___-) i suggest taking at least one CMPT course before taking this class, because some of the concepts are pretty technical. exams are tricky, but they're the same every yr (they're from exam banks :]) READ the text & u'll do fine!

people say this course is hard, but not really. All you have to do is memorize those tons of concepts. you might feel hard cuz it is all the computer terms, but dont be afraid and just memorize them. course is fine, instructore is even better. he is enthusiastic and helpful. take 237 with andrew!!

AWESOME PROF, CRAZY EXAMS.The workload is quite heavy (2 exams, 3 assignments, 8 quizzes, and a group presentation) but you actually learn a lot. Make sure you stay on top of everything before entering the exam, because they are like, REAL TOUGH. Andrew is one of the best prof ever though!
Andrew has a sexy voice.  You can listen to his lectures on tape too.  It has helped me learn project management concepts better.
Great guy, excellent knowledge, high soft skills

Assignments & projects does require time & effort to get high marks. Midterms are fair, and b/c it's a curved course, getting a high mark isn't really all that hard. materials r applicable, i love his sense of humour. tries to make lectures interesting.. NOT boring! REcommended!

Andrew is a good proffessor, his exams are really hard though....i hate multiple choice questions and the whole exams (both midterma and final) are 60 multiple choice questions....pay attention to his notes more than the text....the class seems easy but the exams screw you over.

The only thing wrong with Dr. Gemino is his horrible ponytail. His strong points are that he is understanding, his lectures are clear and his expectations are well defined. The midterm wasn't as hard as everybody was saying. I got within the 90th percentile without much studying. Not a GPA booster class, but a good class to learn basic MIS
The class is pretty boring. I hated the assgnements- don't waste your time on them. The exams ask a lot of useless questions.

He's very clear and friendly. He provides open book quizzes/free marks every week just to help us to keep up with the readings. fair assignments, hard mitderm but easy final... i think it's the student's benefit, since the final worth more than t he midterm. Overall, a very nice prof.
talented and nice prof. but very hard exams.

Lectures are quite interesting, but Midterm was terrible: asks useless trivia. Weekly quizzes keep readings up-to-date. Constantly advertises upper-level MIS courses in class. Maybe he should consider Marketing instead.

He's really funny and easy-going.  Midterm was terrible but he definitely took our complaints to heart and made the final much easier.  However he gave alot of extra notes not covered in the text.  Be sure to study both the text and notes!!

As others said, if you are going to take his course be ready for the midterm and finals. It's quite hard. I'm usually a straight A student but i flunked on his midterm, so guys be prepared. Other than that he's a great prof.

Ok Andrew is definatly a good prof teaching wise...but the tests are HORRIBLE!!!! Like serioulsy some of the quesitons are so irrelevent to the material. like questions about average salary of an IT worker, like hunh? and on the final he asks us to name the autors of a book... seriously.
lectures were GREAT! but the midterm killed most of the students... Other than the midterm, everything's perfect!

Awesome prof. engaging,and approachable. Midterm was terrible tho...i thought it was for a different class! content is useless and boring but prof makes it bareable and somewhat entertaining. really not a technical class a lot of theoretically stuff
Always promoting the classes he teach...like anyone interested to have him more than once or something...
He's a good guy, but his midterm was nuts.  Assignments are easy but they take off marks for weird things.  Midterm is the only hard part, other then that the class is pretty easy.

The guy is just a pompous moron. Has no clue about IT/MIS in real life. The entire course was just a write-off for me. I had a strong IT background, and was really looking forward to learning IT managemment, but this course was utterly useless for that.
TRUE! the midterm was hell...extremely low average.  multiple choices are vague and not useful in real business applications. can be funny sometimes though.
He might be a good bass player but he's not good at teaching...midterm was irrelevant. Only 15/60 qs from notes/texts, the rest, you can just guess
The Midterm is crazy, it is totally irrelevant to the textbook. WTF is wrong with asking you about GDP in an IT COURSE????
He's the BEST!!
No Comments
Nice to students, with everything that an excellent prof has.  He's even willing to reschedule the final exam and project due day!
